focalfunc: func (d *dbBase) readBatchSQL(tables *dbTables, tCols []string, cond *Condition, qs querySet, mi *models.ModelInfo, tz *time.Location) (string, []interface{})
funcbody:
func (d *dbBase) readBatchSQL(tables *dbTables, tCols []string, cond *Condition, qs querySet, mi *models.ModelInfo, tz *time.Location) (string, []interface{}) {
	cols := d.preProcCols(tCols)

	buf := buffers.Get()
	defer buffers.Put(buf)

	args := d.readSQL(buf, tables, cols, cond, qs, mi, tz)

	query := buf.String()

	d.ins.ReplaceMarks(&query)

	return query, args
}
